message:
fcp-store: crash-safe durable object + symbol stores

Introduces a new `durable` module providing filesystem-backed
`DurableObjectStore` and `DurableSymbolStore` implementations that
sit behind the existing in-memory trait interfaces. Lets operators
upgrade from the process-lifetime memory stores without rewiring
any call sites.

Durability contract:
- Every mutating operation is appended to a checksummed WAL record
  and sync_all()'d to disk before the in-memory state change is
  made visible to readers.
- Checkpoints are written to a sibling temp file in the target dir,
  sync_all()'d, atomically renamed into place, and the containing
  directory is fsynced on platforms that support it. This ensures
  crash recovery can never see a half-written checkpoint and the
  rename itself is durable after power loss.
- Startup replays only checksum-valid WAL records and truncates any
  torn or corrupt tail - a partial append (e.g. SIGKILL mid-flush)
  cannot poison subsequent recovery.

Dep changes (Cargo.toml + Cargo.lock regen):
- add blake3 (WAL record checksums)
- add tempfile (dev-dep, checkpoint atomicity tests)
- add serde_json (WAL record envelope serialization)

lib.rs re-exports the four new public types so downstream crates can
opt into the durable variants by constructor name alone.

Cargo.lock also picks up transitive bumps for fcp-audit's
(previously declared) dev-deps on blake3/hex/insta and fcp-cbor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2182,6 +2182,10 @@ dependencies = [
 name = "fcp-audit"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
+ "blake3",
+ "fcp-cbor",
+ "hex",
+ "insta",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
@@ -5346,6 +5350,7 @@ name = "fcp-store"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "async-trait",
+ "blake3",
  "bytes",
  "chrono",
  "criterion",
@@ -5360,6 +5365,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "semver",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
+ "tempfile",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
  "tracing",
  "uuid",

@@ -16,8 +16,10 @@ bytes.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true
 parking_lot.workspace = true
 async-trait.workspace = true
+blake3.workspace = true
 
 # Internal crates
 fcp-async-core = { path = "../fcp-async-core" }
@@ -34,6 +36,7 @@ chrono.workspace = true
 uuid.workspace = true
 rand.workspace = true
 criterion = { version = "0.8", features = ["html_reports"] }
+tempfile = "3"
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "symbol_store"
